summary: Partner Admin Account Management fix tested and verified. Backend: 14/14 tests pass (100%). Frontend: Account Management section correctly visible to partner admin with Organizations, Accounts, All Users items. Super admin-only items (Admin Dashboard, Lead Attribution, Pending Users, Individuals) correctly hidden for partner admin.
critical_code_review_comments: auth.py login endpoint (line 355) correctly adds user['partner_id'] when user's org has partner_id
auth.py /me endpoint (line 515) correctly adds user['partner_id'] for session restoration
more.tsx (line 525) isPartner check now uses user?.partner_id instead of just role
more.tsx (line 611) Account Management section shows for isSuperAdmin || isPartner
Super admin only items (Admin Dashboard, Individuals, Pending Users, Lead Attribution) wrapped in isSuperAdmin conditional
seed_data_creation: Completed onboarding for partner admin user (69ba8350116fd5b3ad1691ba)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Partner admin account management features fully working. Backend confirms: (1) Login returns partner_id in user object, (2) /me endpoint returns partner_id, (3) Partner admin can list/create orgs (auto-linked to partner), (4) Partner admin can list/create stores (inherits partner_id from org), (5) Partner admin can list users across partner orgs. Frontend confirms: Account Management section visible with Organizations, Accounts, All Users for partner admin. Super admin only items correctly hidden.
